sourceTitle: Appropriate Use of Generative AI Tools | Office of Ethics, Risk, and Compliance Services
evidenceSnippetOriginal: If you are considering a new use of Generative AI in your studies or work, it is your responsibility to consider the ethics and risks involved and obtain approval from your instructor/responsible unit head. Be sure to take the AI Essentials Training and consult CERC-AIR, a committee that assesses and offers guidance for mitigating AI risks.
